_comment: Bootstrap fleet policies (Keel M2). Installed to ~/.assistant/policies/policies.json on first triage run when no live file exists. On later runs a version bump here ADDs any rule ids missing from the installed file (never overwrites or removes user rules) and ledgers the upgrade. Ordered, first-match-wins. Every id has a fixture in evals/policy/<id>/ enforced by tests/test_policy.py coverage. Rules for sources whose producers don't exist yet (gmail/github, M5) are deliberately ABSENT — a drop rule against a guessed schema is a data-hiding hazard; their fixtures wait in evals/policy/_pending-m5/. Mutations to the LIVE file go through confirmed `policy` proposals, not hand edits.
